allow: Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-Process java -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id,ProcessName | Format-Table -AutoSize")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Stop-Process -Id 13160 -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Stop-Process -Id 14324 -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host 'Killed my servers \(13160, 14324\). Left your IntelliJ Angular \(19952\) running.'")
Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Start-Service -Name MySQL80 -ErrorAction Stop; Get-Service -Name MySQL80 | Format-Table Name,Status -AutoSize")
